specific_mechanism: Natal-stream homing: salmon imprint chemical cues at birth; return through cascade of branching streams to natal site; chemoreception cascade decodes path
llm_application: LLM in-context retrieval homing: model imprints context-key at input; cascade through layers decodes path back to relevant context window via chemoreception-like attention.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes salmon-run-migration information-cascade mapping as proposed.
